title: Hefty Fire Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. A cocktail of incendiary materials is sealed inside. Throw at enemies to inflict severe fire damage.

title: Hefty Rock Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Filled to the brim with crushed rocks—nothing clever about it. Throw at enemies to inflict heavy damage.

title: Hefty Lightning Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with fulminating materials. Throw at enemies to inflict severe lightning damage.

title: Hefty Fetid Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with noxious materials. Throw at enemies to cause a large buildup of deadly poison.

title: Hefty Fly Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with bloodfly materials. Throw at enemies to release a large swarm of bloodflies.

title: Hefty Freezing Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with freezing materials. Throw at enemies to cause a large buildup of frost.

title: Hefty Poison Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with poisonous materials. Throw at enemies to cause a large buildup of poison.

title: Hefty Oil Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with an abundance of oil. Throw at enemies to soak them in a heavy coat of oil.

title: Hefty Volcano Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with volcanic materials. Creates a heat cloud when thrown, causing continuous heavy fire damage.

title: Hefty Frenzied Flame Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with frenzied materials. Throw at enemies to cause a large buildup of madness.

title: Hefty Rancor Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with ghostflame materials imbued with spite. Uses FP. Throw to spawn a throng of vengeful spirits.

title: Hefty Magic Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with magically resonant materials. Throw to inflict severe magic damage.

title: Hefty Rot Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with scarlet rot materials. Throw at enemies to cause a large buildup of scarlet rot.

title: Hefty Furnace Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with embers of Messmer's flame. Throw at enemies to create a whirlwind of flame.

title: Hefty Red Lightning Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a capacious cracked pot. Sealed with red fulgurbloom. Inflict heavy lightning damage that links to nearby enemies.

title: Red Lightning Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a cracked pot. Sealed with red fulgurbloom. Inflict lightning damage that links to nearby enemies.

title: Frenzied Flame Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a cracked pot. Sealed with frenzied materials. Throw at enemies to cause buildup of madness.

title: Eternal Sleep Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a cracked pot. Sealed with deep-purple materials. Uses FP. Throw to cause buildup of eternal sleep.

title: Roped Frenzied Flame Pot
description: Craftable item prepared using a cracked pot, affixed to a string. Sealed with frenzied materials. Throw behind to cause buildup of madness.

title: Messmerfire Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease made from a mixture of incendiary materials. Craftable item. Coats armament, adding heavy fire damage to attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time. Fire was a symbol of the crusade, and even Messmer's rank-and-file soldiers would wield it.

title: Dragonbolt Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease made from a mixture of fulminating materials. Craftable item. Coats armament, adding heavy lightning damage to attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time. Said to have been a favored tool of the dragon-cult knights who once served the prince of gold.

title: Royal Magic Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease made from a mixture of magically resonant materials. Craftable item. Coats armament, adding heavy magic damage to attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time. Believed to have once been bestowed upon low-ranking Carian knights in lieu of the fellowship's characteristic swords.

title: Golden Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease made from a mixture of holy resonant materials. Craftable item. Coats armament, adding heavy holy damage to attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time. Enchanted with an ancient Erdtree incantation. Such ministrations are all but a lost art in the realm of shadow.

title: Eternal Sleep Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease made from a mixture of deep-purple materials. Craftable item. Coats armament, inflicting eternal sleep. The effect lasts only for a short time. The weak are powerless to resist this velvety sleep, and will never be roused again.

title: Dragon Communion Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease made from a sharp gravel-stone mixture. Craftable item. Coats armament, granting a potent anti-dragon effect. The effect lasts only for a short time. A tool of the old Dragon Communion warriors, who were the agents of the ancient dragons' hatred for their lowborn descendants.

title: Festive Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease made from a mixture of bone shards. Craftable item. Coats armament, imparting a festive incantation that grants the wielder a scant few runes on landing attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time. The delightful festival is an old tradition; one old enough for the Erdtree to tacitly tolerate its endurance.

title: Drawstring Messmerfire Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease attached to a string, made from a mixture of incendiary materials. Craftable item. Quickly coats armament, adding heavy fire damage to attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time.

title: Drawstring Dragonbolt Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease attached to a string, made from a mixture of fulminating materials. Craftable item. Quickly coats armament, adding heavy lightning damage to attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time.

title: Drawstring Royal Magic Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease attached to a string, made from a mixture of magically resonant materials. Craftable item. Quickly coats armament, adding heavy magic damage to attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time.

title: Drawstring Golden Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease attached to a string, made from a mixture of holy resonant materials. Craftable item. Quickly coats armament, adding heavy holy damage to attacks. The effect lasts only for a short time.

title: Drawstring Eternal Sleep Grease
description: Solidified knotgrease attached to a string, made from a mixture of deep-purple materials. Craftable item. Quickly coats armament, inflicting eternal sleep. The effect lasts only for a short time.

title: Spirit Raisin
description: Preparation of dried Rada fruit. Craftable item. Feed to Torrent while riding to enable the spectral steed to push back enemies when breaking into a gallop. The effect ends after a short time. A bitter medicine traditionally claimed to enhance one's spirituality, but Torrent seems to have a taste for it.

title: Blessing of Marika
description: A special physick blessed by Marika, the queen of the Erdtree. Completely restores HP and heals all ailments. Marika once created several of these physicks for Messmer's sake. But never again.

title: Sunwarmth Stone
description: Craftable item. Uses FP to continuously heal nearby allies. A stone imbued with the warmth of sunlight, said to have been blessed by the Erdtree.

title: Lulling Branch
description: Craftable item. A slender branch bearing a soporific bud. Slowly builds up sleep while gradually restoring FP. The sleep it induces is sweet but fleeting, its gentle embrace offering brief reprieve.

title: Dragon Communion Flesh
description: Craftable item. Raw flesh imbued with the essence of dragon communion. Boosts vigor, stamina, strength, and dexterity at cost of gradual HP loss. A tool of communion with the ancient dragons, fashioned in the image of the old rites.

title: Dragonscale Flesh
description: Fleshly scales shorn from a drake. Boosts vigor, stamina, strength, and dexterity at cost of gradual HP loss. Consuming it invites the dragon's ferocity into one's body, but at a terrible cost.

title: Fingerprint Nostrum
description: Craftable item. A nostrum bearing fingerprint patterns. Boosts mind, intelligence, faith, and arcane at cost of gradual HP loss. Imbibing it channels the power of the outer fingers, sharpening the mind at the cost of one's vitality.

title: Spellproof Pickled Liver
description: Craftable item. Liver pickled with glintslab firefly and scorpion. Temporarily grants large boost to magic damage negation. Prepared using an ancient method of preservation native to the Realm of Shadow.

title: Fireproof Pickled Liver
description: Craftable item. Liver pickled with black pyrefly and scorpion. Temporarily grants large boost to fire damage negation. Prepared using an ancient method of preservation native to the Realm of Shadow.

title: Lightningproof Pickled Liver
description: Craftable item. Liver pickled with yellow fulgurbloom and scorpion. Temporarily grants large boost to lightning damage negation. Prepared using an ancient method of preservation native to the Realm of Shadow.

title: Holyproof Pickled Liver
description: Craftable item. Liver pickled with shadow sunflower and scorpion. Temporarily grants large boost to holy damage negation. Prepared using an ancient method of preservation native to the Realm of Shadow.

title: Opaline Pickled Liver
description: Craftable item. Liver pickled with pearlescent scale and scorpion. Temporarily grants large boost to non-physical damage negation. Prepared using an ancient method of preservation native to the Realm of Shadow.

title: Well-Pickled Turtle Neck
description: Craftable item. Turtle neck meat pickled with dewgem and scorpion liver. Temporarily grants large boost to stamina recovery speed. A specialty of the shadow realm, said to fortify the endurance of those who consume it.

title: Scorpion Stew
description: Scorpion simmered in a black soup. Traditional meal of the hornsent. Boosts physical damage negation temporarily and gradually restores HP. Once made with love by a certain elderly woman for the family table. Having long gone cold, this soup gives off a rank, sour smell.

title: Gourmet Scorpion Stew
description: Scorpion simmered in a rich, fragrant black soup. Traditional meal of the hornsent. Boosts physical damage negation temporarily and gradually restores a great amount of HP. A refined preparation of the old recipe, made by one who truly remembers the taste of home.

title: Sacred Bloody Flesh
description: Flesh suffused with sacred blood. Raises physical attack power and arcane once, and again when blood loss occurs. A relic of an old ritual, it pulses with lingering power.

title: Silver Horn Tender
description: Tenderized meat from a silver-horned beast of the Realm of Shadow. Temporarily boosts item discovery. A rare delicacy that sharpens the senses and draws fortune to the hunter.

title: Golden Horn Tender
description: Tenderized meat from a golden-horned beast of the Realm of Shadow. Boosts rune acquisition for a time. A delicacy prized by those who seek great wealth from the fallen.

title: Innard Meat
description: Scraps of flesh for filling great jars. Rancorous spirits cling to the pinkish-red, convulsing meat. Throw at enemies to inflict damage. This is what becomes of the condemned, who get sliced up and stuffed into jars to become saints instead.

title: Charming Branch
description: Craftable item. A branch carved from charmed wood. Uses FP to stab an enemy, charming it and the surrounding enemies. Charmed enemies act as your allies for a short while.

title: Dragon Communion Harpoon
description: Craftable item. A harpoon fashioned with sharp gravel stone. Throw to inflict damage with anti-dragon effect. A weapon of the dragon-hunters, crafted in the tradition of those who made war against the ancient wyrms.

title: Polter Stone
description: Craftable item. A stone imbued with a lingering spirit. Makes a noise imitative of human presence. Useful for distracting enemies or luring them away from their posts.

title: Call of Tibia
description: Craftable item. A resonant bone vessel. Uses FP to summon one lost in death. The sound it emits is said to be the last cry of the dead, calling out from beyond the grave.

title: Surging Frenzied Flame
description: Craftable item. A vessel containing frenzied flame. Uses FP to spew frenzied flame. The madness within surges forth in a torrent, consuming all in its path.

title: Fire Coil
description: Craftable item. A coil of Messmer's ember. Uses FP to conjure a tiny fire snake. The serpent slithers forth, spreading the flames of the crusade to all it touches.

title: Spritestone
description: Craftable item. A stone containing a spirit. Uses FP to release a sprite that slowly homes in on enemies. After a short time, the sprite fades away into glittering lights, causing a spiritual explosion on its passing.

title: Fire Spritestone
description: Craftable item. A stone containing a fire sprite. Uses FP to release a fire sprite that bounces along the ground. The sprite pierces through enemies, dealing fire damage.

title: Glinting Nail
description: A nail of glintstone. Uses FP to fire a shattering magic nail. The nail pierces through the air with magical precision, shattering upon impact.

title: Ancient Dragon's Blessing
description: A blessing bestowed by the ancient dragons. Uses FP to increase all damage negation. The ancient dragons' power suffuses the body, granting protection against all manner of harm.

title: Iris of Grace
description: A blossom suffused with the light of grace. Place on the eye of another to grant them the light of grace as a fleeting blessing. The iris blooms only briefly before it withers and is gone.

title: Iris of Occultation
description: A blossom suffused with occult power. Place on the eye of another to grant them the light of grace as a fleeting blessing. Its occult nature conceals a hidden grace within.

title: Thiollier's Concoction
description: An ebony-black concoction mixed by Thiollier. A condensed, somniferous elixir, purported to be capable of putting even an ancient dragon to sleep. For an ordinary mortal, a single sip would assuredly result in swift and certain death. Thiollier thought of St. Trina's sleep when he created this, but the ebony sleep he concocted had not the sweetness of nectar nor the gentleness of rest's embrace.
